description:
Update Website Contact Information and Social Media Links

Update the website's contact information, address, operating hours, and social media links to reflect current business details for Wesołe Nutki preschool in Wrocław.

Requirements:
- Replace existing Facebook link with: https://www.facebook.com/NutkiWroclaw/
- Remove all Instagram references and links from the site
- Update contact information section with:
  * Phone number: 530 114 202
  * Email: przedszkole@wesolenutki.eu
- Update physical address to: Ul. Łaciarska 8, Wrocław, Poland, 50-104
- Update operating hours display:
  * Monday-Friday: 06:30 - 17:30
  * Saturday-Sunday: ZAMKNIĘTE (Closed)
  * Show "Otwarte teraz" (Open now) status indicator when appropriate
- Ensure all text uses Polish language labels as specified
- Verify all changes are reflected across all pages where this information appears
- Test that links are functional and correctly formatted
- Maintain consistent styling and formatting with existing design
